# Two daemons against the same data dir must not coexist. The store-
# backed claim makes this safe even under concurrent invocation.

exec eon daemon &daemon&
# 2 s leaves room for cold-start under parallel test load.
exec sleep 2
exec eon status
stdout 'daemon:     running'

# Second daemon refuses with exit 4 (conflict).
! exec eon daemon
stderr 'daemon already running'

exec eon stop
wait daemon
